title: Mystic MC
description: Minecraft meets fantasy. Discover a new realm of endless magic and secrets.
body:
![Mystic Minecraft Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8c1bbc8b6d282e18730584166d8f2e09403fc380.png)

### ✨ Description
**Mystic Minecraft** is a **partially vanilla-friendly Fabric modpack for Minecraft**.  
It stays close to the vanilla style while expanding the game with more content, atmosphere, and variety.  
With a fully reworked **UI design (FancyMenu, Dark Mode, custom menus)** the game feels both familiar and fresh.  

The pack combines:  
- 🚀 **Performance** (Sodium, Lithium, FerriteCore, ImmediatelyFast, Distant Horizons)  
- 🎨 **Atmosphere** (Visuality, Falling Leaves, Sound Physics, Enhanced Block Entities)  
- 🌍 **Exploration** (Explorify, Terralith, Nullscape, Dungeons & Taverns, Biomes O’ Plenty)  
- 🏗 **Variety** (new furniture & workstation variants, decorative mods, 3D Ladders)  
- 🧰 **Quality of Life** (AppleSkin, Shoulder Surfing, Traveler’s Backpack, Debugify, Borderless Window, Crash Handler)  

Lightweight, immersive, and stable – perfect for **survival, building, and exploration**.  

---

### 📌 Features
✔ FPS boost + shader support  
✔ Overhauled UI & menus (FancyMenu, Dark Mode)  
✔ Immersive sounds & visual effects  
✔ New biomes, structures & dimensions  
✔ More block and furniture variants  
✔ Practical QoL improvements  
✔ Keeps much of the **vanilla feeling**, but adds extra depth  

---

### 📷 Visual Style
- Dark, modern interface  
- Customized loading & main menus  
- Additional resource packs & shaderpacks for atmosphere  

---
